acceptance_targets: [chapter_13_craft_01_exteriority_runs] PASS if the revised material around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:175 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:353 contains at least two explicit Tiana interior beats in each run (thought, bodily sensation, memory, or self-assessment) and no stretch in either exchange exceeds 9 consecutive paragraphs without such an interior beat; FAIL otherwise.

[chapter_13_craft_02_clipped_narration] PASS if the revised narration at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:53, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:295, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:375 remains tense while every sentence has an explicit grammatical subject and finite verb; FAIL if any of those emphasis beats still depend on clipped fragments.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised material around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:175 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:353 contains at least two explicit Tiana interior beats in each run (thought, bodily sensation, memory, or self-assessment) and no stretch in either exchange exceeds 9 consecutive paragraphs without such an interior beat; FAIL otherwise.
findings.evidence: snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:175, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:183, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:195, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:353, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:375, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:383 — the trunk-sort exchange and the nursing-letter exchange each run 10+ consecutive paragraphs on dialogue/action without an explicit Tiana thought, sensation, memory, or self-assessment, so the chapter briefly reads like staged coverage rather than close-third fiction.
findings.problem: Two major dialogue runs go exterior-only for too long. That violates the brief's interiority requirement and weakens the chapter's strongest asset: Tiana's close, caustic consciousness under pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Re-focalize the run beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:175 and the run beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:353. Add concise Tiana interior beats after Micah wakes, after Kerene's evidence joke lands, and after Marcia deflects the nursing-school question so the reader feels what each exchange costs in Tiana's body and self-story, not just what is said aloud.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised narration at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:53, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:295, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:375 remains tense while every sentence has an explicit grammatical subject and finite verb; FAIL if any of those emphasis beats still depend on clipped fragments.
findings.evidence: snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:53, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:295, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:375 — 'Almost.', 'Relief, already trying to stand up in him.', and 'Not long. Long enough.' rely on clipped narration for emphasis.
findings.problem: Those beats violate the constitution's ban on elliptical clipping in narration. Repeated fragments like this read as shorthand emphasis rather than earned compression, especially in a chapter whose baseline syntax is otherwise natural and controlled.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite the narration at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:53, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:295, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:375 into grammatically complete sentences that preserve the same pressure. Keep the beat sharp, but make the emphasis come from diction and pacing rather than omitted verbs or sentence fragments.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into embarrassment, erotic consequence, moral compromise, and the ugly arithmetic of poverty. When a scene turns on prejudice, bureaucracy, violence, or family betrayal, stay with the room long enough for the reader to feel what each choice costs. Resolve edge cases by choosing the more specific and less flattering truth unless it breaks established character logic.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, racism, injury, debt, hunger, or shame is rendered abstractly, rewrite until the bodily detail, social pressure, and changed leverage are visible on the page.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high — contractions are the spoken norm across the novel; uncontracted forms should appear only for emphasis, ceremony, legal language, or character-specific pressure.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count, dialogue density, and chapter motor across the book: pair public humiliation with private aftermath, follow argument chapters with information-turn or weather chapters, preserve at least three genuinely quiet domestic or communal stretches, and never let more than three chapters in a row hinge on debate followed by decisive action.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary and concrete, with Caribbean-American texture carried naturally in syntax and reference rather than in italicized glossary behavior; lyrical when earned, blunt when the room turns brutal.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person that rotates by chapter; intimate enough for bodily shame and private contradiction, but alert to class performance, racial reading, and room dynamics.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate lean pressure sentences with occasional longer image-bearing sentences; lyric lift should arrive at emotional turns, never as constant prestige haze.
